evidence_type: Systematic review and dose-response meta-analysis of prospective cohort studies
direction: Higher physical activity was associated with lower incidence of type 2 diabetes mellitus
population_context: Adults represented in prospective cohort studies included in the systematic review
evidence_strength: Systematic-review level evidence; interpretation remains dependent on the included observational evidence and study populations

source.citation: Smith AD, Crippa A, Woodcock J, et al. Physical activity and incident type 2 diabetes mellitus: a systematic review and dose-response meta-analysis of prospective cohort studies. Diabetologia. 2016;59(12):2527-2545.

interpretation: Evidence-mapping record describing a population-level association. This record does not generate an individual risk prediction, disease probability, or composite health score.
